U2-FM-01: label the repeated unit before counting
circle or mark each equal group
compare same unit repeated with mixed groups
U2-FM-02: sort equal and unequal group sets
compare one mismatching group with stable repeated groups
ask what must stay the same for the pattern
U2-FM-03: count by groups with teacher modeling
connect equal groups to tiled strips or repeated tiles
U2-FM-04: move between objects strips and tiled spaces
ask what repeats in each context
